GHLIDR
Hello, I'm

Andrés Rivera

Product Designer & Creative Developer

I craft digital experiences that are beautiful, functional, and human-centered. Currently designing at StudioLab in Santiago, Chile.

View My WorkGet in Touch

About Me

Designing with purpose, building with passion

With over 8 years of experience in product design and front-end development, I specialize in creating digital products that solve real problems for real people.

My approach combines user research, visual design, and clean code to deliver experiences that not only look great but work flawlessly. I believe that great design is invisible — it just works.

8+Years Experience
50+Projects Completed
30+Happy Clients

Selected Work

Featured Projects

Web App

FinTrack Dashboard

A financial analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization and AI-powered insights.

View Project →

MindFlow

Meditation and mindfulness app with personalized journeys.

View Project →

EcoVerde Identity

Complete brand identity for a sustainable fashion startup.

View Project →

ArtisanMarket

Online marketplace for handcrafted goods and local artisans.

View Project →
SaaS Platform

TeamSync Pro

A collaborative project management tool designed for remote teams with async-first workflows.

View Project →

Get In Touch

Let's Work Together

Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Whether it's a complete product design, a website, or a creative collaboration, let's make something amazing.

Emailandres@rivera.design
LocationSantiago, Chile

24px;}.port-nav-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:64px;}.port-logo{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;text-decoration:none;border:2px solid #0f172a;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:6px;}.port-nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:32px;}.port-nav-links a{font-size:14px;color:#64748b;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:color 0.2s;}.port-nav-links a:hover{color:#10b981;}.port-social-links{display:flex;gap:12px;}.port-social-link{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#64748b;text-decoration:none;padding:6px 10px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;transition:all 0.2s;}.port-social-link:hover{color:#10b981;border-color:#10b981;}.port-container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;}.port-label{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px;color:#10b981;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;}.port-section-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:40px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin-bottom:20px;line-height:1.2;}.port-section-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:56px;}.port-hero{padding:140px 0 100px;background:#f8fafc;}.port-hero .port-container{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;}.port-hero-content{}.port-hero-label{font-size:16px;color:#10b981;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;}.port-hero-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:60px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:12px;}.port-hero-role{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:22px;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:20px;}.port-hero-desc{font-size:17px;color:#475569;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:32px;}.port-hero-desc strong{color:#0f172a;}.port-hero-actions{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}.port-btn-primary{display:inline-block;padding:14px 32px;background:#10b981;color:#fff;border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;transition:all 0.2s;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}.port-btn-primary:hover{background:#059669;transform:translateY(-1px);}.port-btn-ghost{display:inline-block;padding:14px 32px;background:transparent;color:#0f172a;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;transition:all 0.2s;}.port-btn-ghost:hover{border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981;}.port-btn-full{width:100%;text-align:center;}.port-hero-visual{display:flex;justify-content:center;}.port-hero-image-wrap{width:400px;height:480px;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);}.port-hero-image{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}.port-about{padding:100px 0;background:#fff;}.port-about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;}.port-about-photo{}.port-about-img{width:100%;border-radius:16px;object-fit:cover;}.port-about-text{}.port-about-desc{font-size:16px;color:#475569;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;}.port-about-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:32px;padding-top:32px;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;}.port-about-stat{text-align:center;}.port-stat-num{display:block;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:700;color:#10b981;}.port-stat-text{font-size:13px;color:#94a3b8;}.port-projects{padding:100px 0;background:#f8fafc;}.port-projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;}.port-project-card{position:relative;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;height:320px;}.port-project-wide{grid-column:span 2;}.port-project-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform 0.4s;}.port-project-card:hover .port-project-img{transform:scale(1.05);}.port-project-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 30%,rgba(15,23,42,0.9) 100%);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:28px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;}.port-project-card:hover .port-project-overlay{opacity:1;}.port-project-info{color:#fff;}.port-project-category{font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:#10b981;margin-bottom:8px;display:block;}.port-project-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;}.port-project-desc{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:12px;}.port-project-link{color:#10b981;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;transition:color 0.2s;}.port-project-link:hover{color:#34d399;}.port-skills{padding:100px 0;background:#fff;}.port-skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:40px;}.port-skill-group{}.port-skill-group-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#0f172a;margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:2px solid #10b981;}.port-skill-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}.port-skill-tag{display:inline-block;padding:8px 16px;background:#f1f5f9;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;color:#475569;font-weight:500;transition:all 0.2s;}.port-skill-tag:hover{background:#ecfdf5;border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981;}.port-contact{padding:100px 0;background:#f8fafc;}.port-contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;}.port-contact-info{}.port-contact-desc{font-size:17px;color:#475569;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:32px;}.port-contact-details{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;}.port-contact-item{}.port-contact-label{display:block;font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:4px;}.port-contact-value{font-size:16px;color:#0f172a;font-weight:500;text-decoration:none;}.port-contact-value:hover{color:#10b981;}.port-available{color:#10b981;}.port-contact-form{background:#fff;padding:36px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;}.port-form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}.port-form-group{margin-bottom:20px;}.port-form-label{display:block;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#0f172a;margin-bottom:6px;}.port-form-input{width:100%;padding:12px 16px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:15px;color:#0f172a;transition:border-color 0.2s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;box-sizing:border-box;}.port-form-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#10b981;}.port-form-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:120px;}.port-footer{padding:32px 0;background:#0f172a;color:#94a3b8;}.port-footer-inner{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}.port-footer-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;}.port-footer-logo{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;border:2px solid #fff;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;}.port-footer-copy{font-size:13px;color:#64748b;}.port-footer-right{display:flex;gap:24px;}.port-footer-link{font-size:14px;color:#94a3b8;text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.2s;}.port-footer-link:hover{color:#10b981;}@media(max-width:768px){.port-hero .port-container{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.port-hero-title{font-size:40px;}.port-hero-visual{order:-1;}.port-hero-image-wrap{width:280px;height:340px;}.port-about-grid,.port-contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.port-projects-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.port-project-wide{grid-column:span 1;}.port-skills-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.port-form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.port-footer-inner{flex-direction:column;gap:16px;text-align:center;}.port-footer-right{justify-content:center;}.port-nav-links,.port-social-links{display:none;}}
